dashboard.insight_close_to_goal: Almost there — you're 75%+ towards your goal!

dashboard.insight_behind_schedule: You're behind schedule. Consider adjusting your approach.

dashboard.insight_excellent_consistency: Excellent consistency over the last 2 weeks!

settings.dataSubtitle: Export your data or restore from a backup.
settings.exportJsonDesc: Complete archive of all your data as a single JSON file.
settings.exportCsvDesc: Spreadsheet-friendly CSV files (weight, nutrition, workouts, measurements) bundled in a ZIP.
settings.exportFullBackupDesc: ZIP archive including all data and your progress photos.
settings.importDesc: Restore data from a previously exported JSON file. Existing records on the same date are kept — duplicates are skipped.
settings.importError: Import failed. Make sure the file is a valid BYTB export.
settings.importDetails: Weight: {weight} · Body fat: {fat} · Measurements: {meas} · Nutrition: {nutrition} · Workouts: {workouts} · Skipped: {skipped}
settings.dropzone: Drop a JSON file here or click to browse
settings.dangerDesc: Exports contain all your personal data. Store them securely.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.messagePlaceholder: Describe the bug, suggest a feature, or share your thoughts... (min 10 characters)
feedback.submitSuccess: Thank you! Your feedback has been submitted.
feedback.submitError: Failed to submit. Please try again.

onboarding.step1_desc: Start by creating a goal — weight loss, muscle gain, or body recomposition. Your goal drives everything else.
onboarding.step2_desc: Log your weight daily to see your trend. The more consistently you log, the better the AI insights.
onboarding.step3_desc: Track your daily macros and food journal. Calories, protein, carbs, and fat — all in one place.
onboarding.step4_desc: Record your workouts with exercises, sets, reps, and weight. Track your total volume over time.
onboarding.step5_desc: Ask your AI coach anything about your data. It reads all your logs and gives you personalized advice.

demo.title: Demo Data
demo.description: Populate your account with 60 days of realistic weight, nutrition, and workout data to explore all features.
demo.success: Demo data generated for the last 60 days!
demo.error: Failed to generate demo data. Please try again.
demo.confirmMsg: This will add 60 days of demo weight, nutrition, and workout data to your account. Continue?
